abilities.description:
When the field medic @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.2051538f0c9d5d27]{Heal} themselves or another character, add +1. If they are...

  • Treating someone other than themselves: Either takes +1 spirit.
  • In a fight: Reroll one challenge die.

When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.05909d6310d209a6]{Make a Connection}, you reroll one challenge die. If they roll a match, the field medic and the connection have a history.

  • On a strong hit with a match, the field medic once assisted them and is owed a favor. Mark 1 tick on your bonds legacy track, and @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.141aec8b92efd14b]{Develop Your Relationship} now.
  • On a miss with a match, they fought against each other, and hold a grudge.

When the field medic @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.a2d7793b23c17489]{Secure an Advantage} or @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.3f5a834fa3fea5d1]{Gain Ground} by recurring to a lesson from their field experiences, add +1. If the experience is about providing care, add +2 instead. On a hit, take +2 momentum.
